stoner 0.1.19
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

stone_dump()
Dump touchstone from database to CSV.
stone_extract()
Extract touchstone-relevant data
stone_load()
Load touchstone data to database
stone_stochastic_central()
Produce central average from stochastic files.
stone_stochastic_cert_verify()
Validate stochastic parameter certificate
stone_stochastic_graph()
Stochastic plot
stone_stochastic_process()
Process stochastic data
stone_stochastic_standardise()
Standardise stochastic data files
stone_stochastic_upload()
Upload stochastic data to annex
stone_test_extract()
Test the extracted data.
stone_test_transform()
Test the transformed data.
stone_transform()
Transform extracted_data into transformed_data
stoner_calculate_dalys()
Calculating DALYs for stochastic or central estimates
stoner_dalys_for_db()
Create CSV with DALYs for an uploaded burden estimate set
stoner_life_table()
Calculate life expectancy table

Developed by Wes Hinsley, Rich Fitzjohn, Robert Ashton.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
